current_beat: Team formation complete — Renata, Ephrem, Yuki connected through the problem

relationships.yuki-velazquez: Yuki showed data, Velázquez requested follow-up
relationships.renata-yuki: Renata called Yuki about spectral consistency — first direct contact
relationships.ephrem-physicist: Ephrem consulted on trajectory topology, saw constrained solution space

events: T1: Yuki detects anomalous residuals in the Rubin pipeline during a Tuesday night observing run.
T2: Yuki shows data to Velázquez. Residuals confirmed over four nights. He requests follow-up time.
T3: Mateo at Paranal — ordinary life, documentation, call to mother, bracelet fraying. Seo-yun chasing a wavelength offset. Rubin rumor is background noise.

T4: Renata at IPGP models the object's interior — four runs converge on Earth's signature. Ephrem in Addis sees topology of solution space is more constrained than models suppose. Yuki receives Renata's call in La Serena, reads her residual notes over the phone. The placard with her father's box is open behind her.
